sqlMap.insert: insert into PolicyTransition(PolicyKey NextPolicyKey PreviousPolicyKey ) values (#PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #NextPolicyKey# #PreviousPolicyKey# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('PolicyTransition') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select PolicyTransitionKey, NextPolicyKey, PreviousPolicyKey, PolicyKey from PolicyTransition where PolicyTransitionKey = #PolicyTransitionKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update PolicyTransition set
NextPolicyKey = #NextPolicyKey# NextPolicyKey = null PreviousPolicyKey = #PreviousPolicyKey# PreviousPolicyKey = null
where PolicyTransitionKey = #PolicyTransitionKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PolicyTransition where PolicyTransitionKey = #PolicyTransitionKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PolicyTransitionKey, NextPolicyKey, PreviousPolicyKey, PolicyKey from PolicyTransition where PolicyTransitionKey = #PolicyTransitionKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select PolicyTransitionKey, PolicyKey, NextPolicyKey, PreviousPolicyKey from PolicyTransition where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
